chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P No.S-998 of 2020 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 02.02.2021 Mr. Mohsin Raza, Advocate along with Petitioners. Mr. Talib Ali Memon, Assistant P.G, Sindh along with SIP Ghulam Akber of PS Gulistan-e-Johar and Inspector Syed Imdad A;li Shah of P.S Ghulam Nabi Shah, Umerkot. -x-x-x-x-x- Learned Assistant P.G, Sindh files statements/parawise comments on behalf of respondents No.2, 3 & 4, same being self-explanatory are hereby taken on record. The process issued against private respondents has also been returned duly served, same is also hereby taken on record. Official Respondents in their respective statements have categorically denied the allegations leveled upon them by the petitioners; however, stated that neither they have harassed the couple nor will harass them in future. Mr. Javed Ali, Advocate & associate of Mr. Sohrab Sarki, Advocate for the private respondents, holding brief on his behalf, submits that private respondents have not got registered any case against the couple. As far as harassment is concerned, neither they have harassed them nor will harass in future. Confronting with above submissions as well as comments / statements filed on behalf of official respondents, learned counsel for the petitioners shows his satisfaction and seeks disposal of the petition and submits that legal protection may be provided to the petitioners. Learned Assistant P.G, Sindh undertakes to direct official respondents to provide legal protection to the couple and to act strictly in accordance with law.

Confronting with above submissions as well as comments / statements filed on behalf of official respondents, learned counsel for the petitioners shows his satisfaction and seeks disposal of the petition and submits that legal protection may be provided to the petitioners. Learned Assistant P.G, Sindh undertakes to direct official respondents to provide legal protection to the couple and to act strictly in accordance with law. In view of above, instant petition is hereby disposed of along with pending application(s). Let copy of this order be communicated to respondent No.2 to 4, for compliance. JUDGE Zulfiqar/P.A
